text:
The Reluctant Heroes ＜MODv＞ is the 3rd track on YAMANAIAME. It is also the 14th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Lyrics by mpi
Sung by Mica Caldito

Musicians
Drums: YU "Masshoi" YAMAUCHI
Bass: TOSHINO TANABE
Guitars: HARUTOSHI ITO
Keyboards & All Other Instruments: 

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of The Reluctant Heroes.

Lyrics

We have lost our edge
Don't you know?
Forgotten is the life we led
Now it seems
You don't care what the risk is
The peaceful times have made us blind

It's time after time

I'm hiding in my room

So you can't fly if you never try
You told me, oh, long ago
But you left the Wall

So more than ever, it's real

It was like a nightmare
And it's painful for me
'Cause nobody wants to die too fast
Remember the day of grief
Now it's strange for me
